summary: Case (a): left of q=0 isoline. Case (b): left of q=0.2 isoline (q∈[0,0.2] counted single). Production labels use case (a).

ngc_1039.note: M34/Praesepe focus: case (b) lowers positive rate; check if model recall@0.5 improves under less strict boundary.

ngc_2632.note: M34/Praesepe focus: case (b) lowers positive rate; check if model recall@0.5 improves under less strict boundary.

recommendation.rationale: M34 case_b pos 0.541 vs case_a 0.408; Praesepe case_b 0.441 vs case_a 0.429. Case (b) is stricter (fewer positives). Switch only if paper methodology requires q=0.2 boundary.
